holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

overview.description: The REX Autocallable Income ETF (ATCL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed, seeks to make monthly distributions by utilizing a daily laddered autocallable income strategy on a synthetic portfolio of unfunded swaps. The fund seeks high monthly income with reduced downside risk. ATCL was launched on Feb 18, 2026 and is issued by REX Shares.
